subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath illumined the horizons through the resplendent Light that shineth from the horizon of the heaven of the Hijaz, whereby He hath shed His radiance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نور الافاق من النور اللائح المشرق من افق سماء الحجاز و به اضاء
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
